Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Turing Award Honors Bennett and Brassard for Quantum Information Science 55 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. FFmpeg 101 (2024) 157 upvotes, 5 comments
  3. Lent and Lisp 73 upvotes, 3 comments
  4. Linux Applications Programming by Example: The Fundamental APIs (2nd Edition) 133 upvotes, 16 comments
  5. Attention Residuals 204 upvotes, 28 comments
  6. Ghostling 265 upvotes, 50 comments
  7. Mamba-3 213 upvotes, 42 comments
  8. Blocking Internet Archive Won't Stop AI, but Will Erase Web's Historical Record 266 upvotes, 69 comments
  9. Meta's Omnilingual MT for 1,600 Languages 55 upvotes, 10 comments
  10. VisiCalc Reconstructed 218 upvotes, 79 comments
  11. Fujifilm X RAW STUDIO webapp clone 112 upvotes, 40 comments
  12. OpenCode – Open source AI coding agent 1035 upvotes, 489 comments
  13. Molly Guard 156 upvotes, 67 comments
  14. The Los Angeles Aqueduct Is Wild 389 upvotes, 194 comments
  15. The worst volume control UI in the world (2017) 182 upvotes, 88 comments
  16. How HN: Ironkernel – Python expressions, Rust parallel 18 upvotes, 4 comments
  17. Books of the Century by Le Monde 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  18. Show HN: We built a terminal-only Bluesky / AT Proto client written in Fortran 111 upvotes, 56 comments
  19. The Ugliest Airplane: An Appreciation 100 upvotes, 50 comments
  20. Padel Chess – tactical simulator for padel 59 upvotes, 29 comments
  21. We rewrote our Rust WASM parser in TypeScript and it got faster 254 upvotes, 161 comments
  22. Cryptography in Home Entertainment (2004) 66 upvotes, 36 comments
  23. A Japanese glossary of chopsticks faux pas (2022) 367 upvotes, 280 comments
  24. France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app 597 upvotes, 480 comments
  25. Albert's Swarm 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  26. Major leap towards reanimation after death as mammal's brain preserved 15 upvotes, 7 comments
  27. The Story of Marina Abramovic and Ulay (2020) 25 upvotes, 18 comments
  28. Mayor of Paris removed parking spaces, "drastically" reduced the number of cars 134 upvotes, 140 comments
  29. Why western carmakers' retreat from electric risks dooming them to irrelevance 89 upvotes, 110 comments
  30. Just make it hard to fail 14 upvotes, 11 comments

Last generated 11:30pm, 21 March 2026. Source here.
